prompt: Create a cinematic black-and-white wide portrait of a tattooed dark fantasy warrior-priest standing on a rugged mountain ridge, centered in frame, arms extended outward in a commanding ritual pose. The figure has messy dark hair, a deliberately obscured blurred square over the face, bare tattooed chest, and an intense mythic presence. Costume details: exactly 6 prominent outfit components are visible: 1 heavy black velvet cloak draped over the left shoulder and arm with ornate trim, 1 polished crescent-shaped metal chest plate with round studs and chain details, 1 dark layered skirt or kilt, 1 wide belt with circular metal medallions, 1 hanging central pendant ornament, and 1 set of arm tattoos covering both forearms. The left hand is open and expressive, the right hand loosely holds a thin dangling cord or chain. Place the character outdoors on a steep rocky hillside with a jagged mountain slope rising on the right, a distant valley and horizon on the left, and a sky with exactly 3 small soft clouds. Use high-contrast monochrome cinematic photography, gritty film grain, shallow depth of field, dramatic natural sunlight glinting on the metal armor, strong texture in the cloak, atmospheric haze in the valley, and a widescreen 16:9 composition. Mood: epic, mysterious, occult, fashion-editorial fantasy. No text, no watermark, no modern objects.
